valid_actions.name: inspect_service
valid_actions.description: Observe detailed metrics for a specific service. Required before diagnosis.

valid_actions.name: inspect_dependency
valid_actions.description: Inspect the dependency chain of a service. Reveals hidden upstream issues.

valid_actions.name: restart_service
valid_actions.description: Hard restart a service. Clears state but may cause temporary outage and cascades.

valid_actions.name: scale_service
valid_actions.description: Horizontally scale a service to reduce queue depth and latency under load.

valid_actions.name: rollback_deploy
valid_actions.description: Roll back the most recent deployment of a service. Resolves bad deploys.

valid_actions.name: reroute_traffic
valid_actions.description: Reroute traffic away from a degraded service to healthy replicas.

valid_actions.name: throttle_queue
valid_actions.description: Throttle incoming queue for a service to prevent overload and reduce backlog.

valid_actions.name: silence_alert
valid_actions.description: Silence a noisy alert. Useful for noise reduction — does not fix the underlying issue.

valid_actions.name: noop
valid_actions.description: Take no action. Useful only when gathering information. Penalised if overused.
